title: Cuproptosis-related Gene SLC31A1 Correlates with M2 Macrophage Infiltration and Serves as a Potential Therapeutic Target in Glioma: A Comprehensive Analysis of 1573 Samples from TCGA and CGGA Databases.
publicationName: Recent patents on anti-cancer drug discovery
journalName: Recent patents on anti-cancer drug discovery
snippet: Cuproptosis is a newly discovered form of programmed cell death that offers a new perspective on glioma treatment. However, the clinical impacts of CuproptosisRelated Genes (CRGs) in glioma remain largely unclear. This study aimed to investigate the role and biological significance of CRGs in glioma. The current study included 1573 glioma patients (603 from...
